headline: Microsoft AI Security And Fabric Partnerships Tested Against Valuation Discount
summary: Accenture and Microsoft are expanding their cybersecurity partnership with new AI driven threat detection and response capabilities across Microsoft security platforms. Microsoft Fabric IQ is adding native Lumel enterprise planning to support finance and operations teams on Microsoft’s data and AI stack. Deeper integration with UiPath connects Microsoft Defender and Sentinel to automated workflows that streamline threat detection and response for enterprise clients. For investors tracking...
